citations.desc: Cleaning, sanitization, housekeeping, and pest control.
citations.narrative:
There is an accumulation of feces that is not being removed from the crow enclosure. This build up is in multiple areas of
flat surfaces. Feces and food waste needs to be removed from primary enclosures as often as necessary to prevent
excessive accumulation and to prevent soiling of the birds.
Correct by: Feb 15, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
